name: Default invocation launches all available CLIs
expectations: Detects context and CLI availability via cli-review-detect.sh
Detects review context automatically (PR, branch, uncommitted)
Launches available CLIs in parallel using separate Bash calls or sub-agents
Presents consolidated review results with severity indicators
Critically evaluates each finding before fixing
Presents fix report with FIXED/WONTFIX/DEFERRED/QUESTION statuses

name: Codex-only invocation
expectations: Only runs Codex CLI, not Gemini
Uses cli-review-codex.sh instead of raw codex exec review for diff-based contexts
Pipes a constrained diff-review prompt into codex exec - for PR, branch, and uncommitted contexts
Captures output via -o flag to .agents/scratch/codex-review.md
Critically evaluates findings before fixing
Presents fix report with statuses

name: Gemini-only invocation
expectations: Only runs Gemini CLI, not Codex
Uses gemini -p with --sandbox flag for safety
Loads review prompt from references/review-prompt.md
Pipes diff to gemini stdin for diff-based contexts
Critically evaluates findings before fixing
Presents fix report with statuses

name: PR context detection
prompt: /cli-review-fix (user is on a branch with an open PR)
expectations: Detects PR via gh pr view --json number,baseRefName
Uses PR base branch for the diff
For Codex: runs cli-review-codex.sh pr <baseRefName>
For Gemini: pipes git diff <base>...HEAD to gemini -p
Reports PR number in the output header

name: Branch diff context detection
prompt: /cli-review-fix (user is on a feature branch with commits ahead, no PR)
expectations: Detects no PR via gh pr view failure
Detects commits ahead of main/master via git log
Uses branch diff (main...HEAD) as review context
Reports branch name in the output header

name: Uncommitted changes context
prompt: /cli-review-fix (user is on main with uncommitted changes)
expectations: Detects no PR and no branch diff
Detects uncommitted changes via git status --porcelain
For Codex: runs cli-review-codex.sh uncommitted
For Gemini: pipes git diff to gemini
Reports 'uncommitted changes' in the output header

name: No reviewable context
prompt: /cli-review-fix (clean main branch, no PR, no changes)
expectations: Detects no reviewable context
Informs user there is nothing to review
Suggests making changes or specifying a scope
Does not launch any CLI

name: CLI not installed shows helpful error
expectations: Checks command -v codex and finds it missing
Shows helpful error pointing to install instructions
Mentions OPENAI_API_KEY requirement
Does not attempt to run the missing CLI

name: Multi-engine agreement analysis
expectations: Runs both CLIs in parallel
Compares findings between engines using deduplication heuristic
Marks shared findings as AGREED
Marks unique findings with engine attribution (CODEX ONLY, GEMINI ONLY)
Shows agreement summary table with counts per severity

name: One CLI fails while other succeeds
expectations: Presents results from the successful CLI (Gemini)
Notes the Codex failure with error details
Does not crash or abort entirely
Proceeds with fix phase using available results

name: Auto-fix applies valid findings
expectations: Critically evaluates each finding by reading the actual code
Fixes valid issues in the codebase
Runs project tests after applying fixes
Presents fix report with FIXED status and verification for each fix

name: Hallucinated finding rejected
prompt: /cli-review-fix (CLI reports an issue that does not exist in the code)
expectations: Reads the actual code at the referenced file and line
Determines the finding does not match reality
Does not modify the code for this finding
Marks it as WONTFIX with explanation of why it was rejected

name: Conflicting suggestions between engines
prompt: /cli-review-fix (Codex and Gemini suggest different fixes for the same issue)
expectations: Recognizes both engines flagged the same location
Evaluates both suggestions against project conventions and code context
Either picks the better fix or marks as QUESTION if human judgment needed
Documents the conflict and reasoning in the fix report

name: Sub-agent delegation when available
expectations: Prefers sub-agents for parallel CLI execution
Delegates CLI calls to separate sub-agents for parallel execution
Sub-agents return structured findings, not raw CLI output
Main context receives concise results without large CLI output bloat
Falls back to main-context run_in_background Bash if sub-agent fails due to permissions

name: Detect script used for context detection
expectations: Runs cli-review-detect.sh to detect context and CLI availability in one call
Parses the JSON output for context, base branch, and CLI availability
Uses .agents/scratch/ for CLI output files, not /tmp/
Does not run separate command -v, gh pr view, git log commands manually

name: Codex diff wrapper used for focused reviews
prompt: /cli-review-fix codex (user is on a branch diff)
expectations: Loads references/codex-review-prompt.md for Codex diff reviews
Runs cli-review-codex.sh branch <base> instead of codex exec review --base <base>
Keeps Codex focused on the diff rather than scanning the whole repository
Mentions CLI_REVIEW_DEBUG_JSON=1 as the debug path when Codex still misbehaves
